input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.1.7.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.1.7.1
            TITLE: all vehicles must have a floor closeout to prevent track debris from entering

            CONTENT:
            rule T.1.7.1: All vehicles must have a Floor Closeout to prevent track debris from entering
T.1.7.1 All vehicles must have a Floor Closeout to prevent track debris from entering

final_answer: All vehicles must have a Floor Closeout to prevent track debris from entering
